title: Process (v2 primitive)
description: A producer of events — a unit of computation or action with declared inputs, outputs, and effects. One of the six v2 root primitives. Agents, Workflows, Skills, and MCPDeployments all compose a Process slot.

process_kind.description: What kind of process this is (e.g., 'agent_runtime', 'workflow_template', 'skill_invocation', 'mcp_server').

inputs_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the shape of inputs this process accepts. Null = no typed input contract.

outputs_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the shape of outputs this process produces. Null = no typed output contract.

effects.description: Scopes this process may write into / produce events within.

implementation_ref.description: Opaque reference to the process implementation (e.g., a skill archive URI, an agent runtime ID, a workflow graph ID).
